title: × elyhordeum californicum
intro: × Elyhordeum californicum is a hybrid plant, specifically a cross between Elymus elymoides and Hordeum murinum, which is commonly known as a type of wild grass. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include its potential to aid in digestion, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of × elyhordeum californicum include its ability to soothe digestive issues, alleviate symptoms of colds and flu, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits.
